subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the light of guidance, Jinab-i-Áqá Mírzá Yúnus! Praise be unto God that thou hast been delivered from the belly of the fish of separation and deprivation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بنور هدی جناب آقا میرزا یونس الحمد لله از بطن ماهی فراق و حرمان نجات یافته چون
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God
